services:
device-info:
Name=slw-nas(AFP)
IPv4=192.168.1.23
IPv6=fe80::265e:beff:fe69:a313
Hostname=slw-nas.local
TTL=10
model=Xserve
9/tcp workstation:
Name=slw-nas [24:5e:be:69:a3:13]
IPv4=192.168.1.23
IPv6=fe80::265e:beff:fe69:a313
Hostname=slw-nas.local
TTL=10
445/tcp smb:
Name=slw-nas
IPv4=192.168.1.23
IPv6=fe80::265e:beff:fe69:a313
Hostname=slw-nas.local
TTL=10
548/tcp afpovertcp:
Name=slw-nas(AFP)
IPv4=192.168.1.23
IPv6=fe80::265e:beff:fe69:a313
Hostname=slw-nas.local
TTL=10
5000/tcp http:
Name=slw-nas
IPv4=192.168.1.23
IPv6=fe80::265e:beff:fe69:a313
Hostname=slw-nas.local
TTL=10
path=/
5000/tcp qdiscover:
Name=slw-nas
IPv4=192.168.1.23
IPv6=fe80::265e:beff:fe69:a313
Hostname=slw-nas.local
TTL=10
accessPort=86,accessType=https,displayModel=TS-464C,fwBuildNum=20260214,fwVer=5.2.9,model=TS-X64
answers:
PTR:
_workstation._tcp.local
_http._tcp.local
_smb._tcp.local
_qdiscover._tcp.local
_device-info._tcp.local
_afpovertcp._tcp.local
